business_question: What is the total monthly revenue by customer subscription plan?
business_context: The Finance team wants to track monthly recurring revenue growth across different subscription plans to identify high-performing plans.
chain_of_thought: Step 2: Group customers based on subscription plans.
sql_answer:
SELECT 
    p.subscription_plan,
    d.month_name,
    SUM(f.revenue_usd) AS total_revenue
FROM fact_payments f
JOIN dim_plan p
    ON f.plan_id = p.plan_id
JOIN dim_date d
    ON f.date_id = d.date_id
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY 3 DESC;
